subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and, owing to lack of time, a brief reply is herewith written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از عدم فرصت مختصر جواب مرقوم میگردد ملاحظه ای
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters
